description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs, build-cmake and build-bam, each running on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, windows-latest, and ubuntu-18.04. The build-cmake job checks out the repository, prepares the environment, builds and tests the project in debug and release modes using CMake, and packages the release artifacts. The build-bam job checks out the repository and a specific bam repository, prepares the environment, builds and tests the project in debug and release modes using bam.
